mano_cua.result_summary: Git clone持续失败：尝试5次（有proxy/无proxy/depth 1/depth 50/gh CLI），均因网络超时或early EOF无法完成。仓库56MB，网络不稳定导致大仓库clone失败。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Network consistently times out when cloning this 56MB repo. Tried multiple approaches (with/without proxy, different depths, gh CLI) - all failed.
